notes: Truncation fix (Pardo et al. 2018) restored hover stability — 4/5 runs hover full 29.98s (vs exp_032's 2.92s crash-heavy). Better GAE value estimates made model more conservative. But 0 gates — back in hover trap. The fix works (better value function) but the reward signal still doesn't create enough incentive to overcome the hover local optimum with stable navigation.
